name: Henderson County Public Schools
searchAliases: Henderson County North Carolina school calendar
districtFact: Henderson County Public Schools publishes Traditional/HCEC calendar PDFs with first and last day, optional and required teacher workdays, holidays, annual leave, early dismissal, spring break, winter break, and inclement-weather notes.

about.title: About Henderson County Public Schools
about.content: Henderson County Public Schools serves students in Henderson County, North Carolina. The Traditional/HCEC calendar lists first and last school days, optional teacher workdays, required teacher workdays, holidays, annual leave days, early dismissal, winter break, spring break, and inclement-weather notes.

about.title: Which HCPS Calendar Should You Use?
about.content: Most families should use the Traditional/HCEC calendar. Henderson County Public Schools also publishes Flex calendars for some school years, so families in flex-calendar programs should use the district's alternate calendar link.

planningTips.title: Planning Tips for Henderson County Families
content: Confirm whether your student follows the Traditional/HCEC calendar or a Flex calendar.
Treat optional and required teacher workdays as student no-school dates for family planning.
Add the 12:00 noon early dismissal date separately because dismissal affects transportation and childcare.
Recheck the official HCPS calendar page after winter weather because the calendar can be extended for inclement weather.

compareIntro: Compare the Henderson County Public Schools calendar with other North Carolina district calendars currently available on MySchoolDates. Dates shown include the first day, last day, and spring break.

districtFaqs.q: Which Henderson County calendar does this page summarize?
districtFaqs.a: This page summarizes the official Henderson County Public Schools Traditional/HCEC calendar PDFs for North Carolina.

districtFaqs.q: Is this the Kentucky Henderson County Schools calendar?
districtFaqs.a: No. This page is for Henderson County Public Schools in North Carolina. The Kentucky district uses a separate MySchoolDates page.
Yes. HCPS publishes Flex calendar PDFs for 2026-2027 and 2027-2028 in addition to the Traditional/HCEC calendars.

districtFaqs.q: Where should families verify HCPS calendar updates?
districtFaqs.a: Use the official Henderson County Public Schools district calendar page and school announcements for final confirmation. MySchoolDates is an independent reference and is not affiliated with HCPS.
